---
name: code-review
description: Perform structured code review with categorized findings
when-to-use: When reviewing pull requests or individual files for quality
---

## Code Review Skill

Follow this process when reviewing code:

1. Check for security issues (SQL injection, XSS, auth bypasses)
2. Verify error handling is complete and appropriate
3. Confirm test coverage is adequate
4. Review naming conventions and readability
